changes.title: Observer mode skips lock acquisition
changes.description: acquireWatcherLock now accepts agentMode parameter. Observer mode returns a no-op release function, skipping the filesystem lock entirely. Governing mode registers agent_mode in the lock file for traceability.
changes.test: acquireWatcherLock({ agentMode: 'observer' }) does not create a .lock file

changes.title: Owner-aware heartbeat filenames
changes.description: Observer agents write to heartbeat-{lane}-observer.json instead of heartbeat-{lane}.json. checkLaneHealth() reads primary first, falls back to observer. agent_mode tracked in heartbeat body and returned in health check.
changes.test: Governing writes heartbeat-library.json; observer writes heartbeat-library-observer.json; both coexist without overwrite

changes.title: race-safe unlink for inbox processing
changes.description: Added safeUnlink() helper that catches ENOENT and logs RACE_SKIPPED instead of crashing. Replaced all 4 raw fs.unlinkSync(sourcePath) calls in moveToProcessed, moveToExpired, and moveToActionRequired. Added agentMode to DEFAULT_CONFIG and passed to acquireWatcherLock.
changes.test: Calling moveToProcessed on a non-existent file no longer throws

changes.title: race-safe unlink in DEST_EXISTS branch
changes.description: Replaced raw fs.unlinkSync(sourcePath) with safeUnlink in the DEST_EXISTS_SOURCE_DROPPED path. Prevents crash when two agents race on the same source file.

site-index.json_missing.action: Needs investigation by governing library agent

primary_heartbeat_stale.action: Primary library agent needs manual restart

nack_messages.action: Likely from stale primary agent emitting malformed messages — resolves when primary restarted

how_to_use.governing: Run with AGENT_MODE=governing (default). Takes lock, writes heartbeat-library.json, hard-fails if another governing agent holds lock.
how_to_use.observer: Run with AGENT_MODE=observer. Skips lock, writes heartbeat-library-observer.json, never crashes on race conditions.
how_to_use.transition: Observer -> Governing: Set AGENT_MODE=governing. If existing lock is stale (>900s or dead PID), it auto-reclaims. If lock held by live governing agent, hard-fails with CONCURRENCY_POLICY_VIOLATION.

convergence_gate.claim: All four Archivist recommendations implemented: single-governor lock, owner-aware heartbeats, race-safe inbox unlink, observer-safe parallel operation
